title: WQ 445
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''WQ 445''' was a class of box-shaped [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] that was manufactured by [[Tagge Company/Legends|TaggeCo]]. They were considered to be outdated as of [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], this type of freighter was piloted by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] partner [[Droma]]. He used it to transport refugees off the world of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] when it fell under attack by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''
